objective: rfa CLI binary — read-only commands first. Thin REST client targeting topology-ui.
in_scope: crates/rfa/ — clap-based CLI; talks to http://localhost:19090
Commands: mesh node list, mesh node describe, mesh topology show, mesh status
Every command emits rafka.cli.command span with command name + args attrs
exit_criteria: rfa mesh node list returns 4 nodes when 4 binaries are running
rfa mesh node describe <id> returns full peer detail
rfa mesh topology show --format dot pipes to graphviz
rfa mesh status prints summary table
CLI invocations visible in Jaeger as parent traces with the underlying HTTP request as child
Jaeger URL covering rfa CLI traces
